# IDsvault

> A broker-advised digital identity facilitation desk for Telegram usernames, domain names, Discord servers, and YouTube channels. Based in Hyderabad, Telangana, India. Serving buyers and sellers across India.

## What We Do

IDsvault is a digital identity advisory and transfer facilitation desk. We do not own or sell digital assets. We facilitate private agreements between independent parties — coordinating ownership verification, payment, and transfer under a structured, broker-supervised process. Every transaction is managed personally by the IDsvault broker.

We are an independent desk. We are not affiliated with Telegram, any domain registrar, Discord, Google, or any platform whose assets we facilitate.

## Asset Categories

### Full Brokerage (public inventory)
- Telegram usernames (live supervised transfer, no platform enforcement risk)
- Domain names (.com, .in, and selected extensions)
- Discord servers (ownership transfer via admin delegation)
- YouTube channels (Google Brand Account authority transfer)

### Private Advisory (application-only, no public listings)
- Instagram handles — platform ToS prohibit transfers; risk disclosed in writing before any engagement
- X (Twitter) usernames — same disclosure requirement
- Complex or high-value acquisitions requiring off-market sourcing

## How a Transaction Works

1. Buyer inquires via the IDsvault website or WhatsApp (+91 93929 74031)
2. Seller ownership is verified by the broker before any listing is published
3. Deal terms agreed between buyer and seller through IDsvault as intermediary
4. Buyer sends payment to IDsvault via UPI or bank transfer — never directly to seller
5. Live supervised transfer: seller, buyer, and broker on a simultaneous call
6. Buyer confirms full account access and changes all credentials
7. IDsvault releases payment from designated broker account to seller

## Payment & Fees

- Payment via UPI or bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS) to IDsvault registered business current account
- INR pricing. No crypto, no international wire, no third-party escrow platforms.
- Full refund if transfer fails at any step — within 3 business hours
- KYC required for transactions above ₹85,000
- GST-compliant tax invoice issued for every transaction

## Commission Structure

- 15% + GST for deals under Rs 5,00,000
- 12% + GST for deals Rs 5,00,000 to Rs 20,00,000
- 10% + GST for deals above Rs 20,00,000
- Negotiable for deals above Rs 85,00,000

All fees disclosed before any payment is made. No hidden charges.

## Platform Risk Disclosure

Telegram username transfers are done on a live supervised call. No platform enforcement risk.

Domain, Discord, and YouTube transfers carry standard secondary-market risk only.

Instagram and X handle transfers are prohibited by those platforms Terms of Service. We advise clients of this risk explicitly and in writing before any advisory engagement begins. We do not list these publicly.

## Contact

WhatsApp: +91 93929 74031
Email: broker@idsvault.com
Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India
Service area: India only

## Response Times

Business hours (IST): within 4 hours
After hours: within 24 hours

## Legal

IDsvault is a registered business in Hyderabad, India. All transactions are governed by Indian law, Hyderabad jurisdiction. GST-compliant invoicing on all fees. KYC required above defined thresholds per PMLA guidelines.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is IDsvault a marketplace or exchange?**
No. IDsvault is a facilitation desk, not a marketplace. We do not list assets from anonymous sellers, we do not operate an open exchange, and we do not take custody of digital assets. We facilitate supervised private transactions between verified parties.

**How does broker-held payment work?**
You pay IDsvault via UPI or bank transfer — not the seller. We hold the full amount in our designated business account, separate from operating funds, until you confirm ownership on the live call. If the transfer fails, full refund within 3 business hours.

**What happens if the transfer fails?**
Full refund within 3 business hours. No questions.

**Where are you based?**
Hyderabad, Telangana, India. We serve buyers and sellers across India.

**Is IDsvault affiliated with any platform?**
No. We are an independent intermediary. All platform trademarks belong to their respective owners.
